THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIS, ANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FURNITURE AND FURNITURE $1,468.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. THE 10-22-04 CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT IS RESCINDED. CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE ALL FURNITURE IN THE CONTRACT AVAILABLE FOR PICK UP BY THE DEFENDANT: 1-DINING TABLE; 2-CHAIRS; 1-CHINA BUFFET. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
